name: opendray-docs
description: MCP resource manifest for opendray's documentation site. Lets AI agents (Claude, Codex via MCP, etc.) treat opendray-docs as a queryable knowledge base.

transport.note: Endpoint not yet live in v1.0 — manifest stub for future server. Track issue #docs-mcp-server.

resources.name: llms.txt index
resources.description: Markdown index of every doc page with one-line tldr.

resources.name: llms-full.txt
resources.description: Concatenated full text of every doc page.

resources.name: openapi.yaml
resources.description: OpenAPI 3.1 spec for the REST API.

resources.name: sessions capability
resources.description: Session state machine, PTY parameters, multi-client rules.

resources.name: integrations capability
resources.description: Reverse proxy, event WS, scopes, health probes, key rotation.

tools.name: opendray_doc_search
tools.description: Free-text search across opendray docs. Returns top-N matching page URLs with snippet.

tools.name: opendray_capability_query
tools.description: Look up whether a specific kind (channel, provider) supports a specific capability.

prompts.name: explain_capability
prompts.description: Returns the canonical capability matrix for a subsystem.

ai_consumption_recipe: 1. Fetch opendray://docs/llms-index to discover what pages exist.
2. For functional questions, fetch the relevant opendray://docs/capability/* — they are unambiguous and small.
3. For API calls, fetch opendray://docs/openapi to get exact paths + schemas.
4. Only fetch llms-full when narrative context is required (humans-only explanations are in <details> blocks).
